Thanks for the walkthrough, Patricia. So what is coming on the dashboard?
In June, we are going to release version three, with the faster reports you requested.
That is great news. And the mobile app my agents keep asking about?
We are launching it on Tuesday the fifteenth, so your team will work from anywhere.
Perfect. One more thing, the merge-contacts feature we asked for in March?
I will be honest: it is still on the backlog. We are going to review it with you next quarter.

Hi Patricia, this is Marcus from the product team, leaving you a quick voice note before your call with the customer, so we are aligned on the roadmap. Here is the short version you can share. In June, we are going to release version three of the dashboard, and that release includes the two enhancements your client has asked for the most: faster reports and a cleaner mobile view. On top of that, we are launching the new mobile app on Tuesday the fifteenth, so their agents will finally be able to work from their phones. Now, please be careful with dates on the call. Say that this is the plan, not a fixed promise, because the final rollout still depends on testing. If they push for the contact feature they requested last month, be honest: it is on the backlog, we have not built it yet, and we are still working on the estimate. What you can promise is that we are going to review the backlog with them next quarter and prioritize together. So lead with the wins, set the right expectation on the dates, and tell them we will keep them updated at every step. Good luck, and let me know how it goes.

Hi Patricia, this is Sofia, the admin on the customer side, leaving you a short message after I read your release notes. First, thank you, the roadmap is really clear, and my team is excited about the new dashboard. The faster reports are exactly the enhancement we requested, so that is great news. I do have a couple of questions for our call. The mobile app you mentioned, are you launching it for all users on the fifteenth, or only for a small group first? My agents are asking, because some of them want to start using it straight away. My second question is about a feature we asked for back in March, a way to merge duplicate contacts. I cannot find it on this roadmap. Is it still on your backlog, or have you decided not to build it? I am not upset either way, I just need an honest answer and a rough estimate, so I can manage my own team's expectations. If it is going to take a few more months, that is fine, I just want to know. Could you bring those two points to the call on Thursday? Thanks so much, and again, the team is really happy with this release.
